category_sources: source_facts.description says dwarf is an object file manipulation tool; official dwarf-ng man page describes object-file reading and editing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and executable name use dwarf; official repository is dwarf-ng but command name is dwarf.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the repo documentation surface; official/author-hosted man page documents dwarf-ng behavior.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies object-file manipulation; dwarf-ng man page lists Raw, ELF, PE, and Mach-O file support.
